_meta.description: Forward-looking viewer-tier response for GET /api/vehicles. The viewer projection per rest-api.md §5.2.0 strips the P1 `name` field (owner-curated nickname stays owner-only); every other VehicleSummary field remains visible so the viewer can identify the vehicle in their list. This fixture is documented now to lock the wire shape; v1 SERVER behavior returns an empty list to viewer-tier callers because viewer-merged enumeration requires the Go server to read the Prisma-owned Invite table (PLANNED follow-up). Once that lands, this fixture is the canonical viewer response.
